title: Weird World
description: Join V.V. Argost for his educational talk show that covers all things cryptid.
altHero: V.V. Argost sitting in an armchair
alt1: Argost and Munya looking at a bigfoot-like creature laying on the ground
alt2: Munya carrying a tray of meat through a jail and various cryptid arms are reaching out of the cells
alt4: Argost looking at an architectural artifact
